title: Founder OS HQ - Memory
description: Persistent memory store for the Founder OS memory engine. Stores preferences, patterns, facts, contacts, and workflow knowledge extracted and surfaced across all 30 plugins.

Key.description: Unique memory key or short label identifying this memory

Content.description: Full memory content — the stored knowledge or observation

Source Plugin.description: Plugin or actor that created this memory

Confidence.description: Confidence score 0-100 indicating how reliable this memory is

Company.description: Optional: company this memory is scoped to

Tags.description: Free-form tags for grouping and filtering memories

Times Used.description: How many times this memory has been retrieved and applied

Last Used.description: Most recent date this memory was retrieved or applied

Synced At.description: When this memory was last written or updated by the memory engine

notes: Created by the memory engine superpower. Memories progress through candidate → confirmed → applied as they are validated and used. Dismissed memories are retained for audit but excluded from active retrieval. Deduplication: use Key as the unique identifier within a Category. Company relation is populated when a memory is scoped to a specific client. Discovery: search '[FOS] Memory' first, then 'Founder OS HQ - Memory'.
